name: weread-selenium-cli
description: Selenium automation tool for WeRead challenge

scripts.publish:npm:check: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const miss=['name','version'].filter(k=>!p[k]);if(miss.length){console.error('缺少字段: '+miss.join(','));process.exit(1);}if(!/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+(?:-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(?:\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$/.test(p.version)){console.error('version 不是有效 semver: '+p.version);process.exit(1);}console.log('发布校验通过: '+p.name+'@'+p.version);"
scripts.publish:npm:dry-run: npm run publish:npm:check && npm publish --access public --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: npm run publish:npm:check && npm publish --access public
